testcase.name: Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P0] TAB moves focus to Name input field (first focusable element)
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P0] TAB navigates: Name → Cost → DueDate → Add → Clear
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P0] Shift+Tab navigates backward through form fields
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P0] TAB wraps from last element to first (focus cycling)
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P0] TAB skips invisible/hidden elements
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P0] TAB 20+ times consecutively - no element traps focus
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P0] Escape key does not interfere with form
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P0] Focus indicator visible on Name input (outline ≥ 2px)
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P0] Focus indicator visible on all interactive elements
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P0] Focus outline has sufficient contrast (≥ 3:1 WCAG Level A)
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P0] Add subscription, then list renders with proper semantics
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P0] List uses semantic HTML (<ul> and <li> elements)
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P1] Tab order respects DOM order (no tabindex > 0)
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P1] Success message has aria-live attribute for announcements
Story 3.5: Keyboard Navigation & Accessibility (GREEN PHASE) › [P1] Enter key submits form (alternative to clicking button)
